title: ptilotus semilanatus
intro: Ptilotus semilanatus, also known as snottygobble, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ptilotus semilanatus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
